---
title: "Fountain Diet Coke Map"
subtitle: "Crowd-sourced fountain Diet Coke locations in Santa Barbara"
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false

library(leaflet)

leaflet(elementId = "dc-map") |>
  addProviderTiles(providers$CartoDB.Positron) |>
  setView(lng = -119.80, lat = 34.43, zoom = 12)
```

<div id="map-loading">Loading locations...</div>

```{=html}
<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
  // Local CSV generated by scripts/geocode.R
  var csvUrl = "data/locations.csv";

  var loadingEl = document.getElementById("map-loading");

  // Wait for the leaflet htmlwidget to initialize
  var checkMap = setInterval(function() {
    var widget = HTMLWidgets.find("#dc-map");
    if (widget) {
      clearInterval(checkMap);
      var map = widget.getMap();
      loadLocations(map);
    }
  }, 100);

  function loadLocations(map) {
    fetch(csvUrl)
      .then(function(response) { return response.text(); })
      .then(function(csvText) {
        var results = Papa.parse(csvText, { header: true, skipEmptyLines: true });
        var locations = results.data;
        var markerCount = 0;

        // The "locations" tab has clean column names from geocode.R:
        // business_name, address, city, latitude, longitude, consumed, rating, review, submitter
        locations.forEach(function(row) {
          var lat = parseFloat(row.latitude);
          var lng = parseFloat(row.longitude);

          if (isNaN(lat) || isNaN(lng)) return;

          var consumed = (row.consumed || "").toLowerCase() === "yes";
          var verifiedBadge = consumed
            ? '<span style="color: #c1440e; font-weight: bold;">&#10003; Verified</span>'
            : '<span style="color: #8e8e8e;">&#63; Unverified</span>';

          var popup = '<strong>' + escapeHtml(row.business_name || "Unknown") + '</strong><br>' +
                      escapeHtml(row.address || "") + '<br>' +
                      escapeHtml(row.city || "") + '<br>' +
                      verifiedBadge;

          if (row.rating) {
            popup += '<br>Rating: ' + escapeHtml(row.rating) + '/5';
          }

          if (row.review && row.review.trim()) {
            popup += '<br><br><em>"' + escapeHtml(row.review) + '"</em>';
          }

          if (row.submitter && row.submitter.trim()) {
            popup += '<br><small>— ' + escapeHtml(row.submitter) + '</small>';
          }

          L.circleMarker([lat, lng], {
            radius: 8,
            fillColor: consumed ? '#c1440e' : '#a8a8a8',
            color: '#fff',
            weight: 2,
            opacity: 1,
            fillOpacity: 0.8
          }).addTo(map).bindPopup(popup);

          markerCount++;
        });

        if (markerCount > 0) {
          loadingEl.style.display = "none";
        } else {
          loadingEl.innerHTML = "<em>No locations with coordinates found yet. Geocode your submissions by running the geocode.R script!</em>";
        }
      })
      .catch(function(err) {
        console.error("Error loading locations:", err);
        loadingEl.innerHTML = "<em>Could not load locations. Check the console for details.</em>";
      });
  }

  function escapeHtml(text) {
    var div = document.createElement('div');
    div.appendChild(document.createTextNode(text));
    return div.innerHTML;
  }
});
</script>
```

::: {.submit-cta}

### Know a spot with fountain Diet Coke?

Help us map it! Submit a location and we'll add it to the map.

[Submit a Location](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSep4UoqOil2V5x9Mxi1cqu_rlowAbNfmzpCryh0ZZQ1L4LlyQ/viewform){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg target="_blank"}

:::
